_meta.note: ANONYMIZED, English, k>=3-org distilled patterns from Binclusive's dynamic-audit corpus. Failure-shapes clustered offline by LLM (frozen in data/clusters/), gated k>=3-distinct-org and anonymized by deterministic code. Contains NO customer identifiers (org/project ids, elements, urls stripped; frequency as tier only). Regenerate by re-running the distiller.

patterns.failureShape: A custom widget (combobox, select, slider, date picker, autocomplete) can't be operated by keyboard — it won't expand or change value with Enter/Space/Arrow keys, or its options aren't navigable — so keyboard users can't use it.
patterns.fix: Implement the WAI-ARIA keyboard pattern for the widget (Enter/Space to open, Arrow keys to move, aria-activedescendant or roving tabindex for the active option), or replace it with a native <select>/<input> that gets keyboard support for free.

patterns.failureShape: A control that should work with the keyboard doesn't — a checkbox or radio won't toggle on Space, a button or link won't activate on Enter/Space — because a custom handler intercepts or replaces the native key behavior.
patterns.fix: Use native interactive elements (<button>, <a href>, <input>) and don't preventDefault their key handling. For custom controls, handle Enter and Space (and Arrow keys for radios) per the ARIA pattern so activation matches a click.

patterns.failureShape: Interactive content can't be reached by keyboard at all — it's absent from the tab order and accessibility tree, gated behind an inaccessible captcha, or the page is so unresponsive that keyboard actions time out — fully blocking the task.
patterns.fix: Ensure all interactive content renders into the DOM and tab order and is operable by keyboard. Provide accessible alternatives for captchas, and fix scripts/performance that make the page unresponsive to keyboard input.

patterns.failureShape: Keyboard focus gets stuck or skips — it can't move past a widget (e.g. FAQ tabs), or it jumps over revealed options and lands on the wrong element — so the keyboard user can't traverse the page.
patterns.fix: Manage focus so Tab and Arrow keys move predictably and nothing traps focus unintentionally. When content opens, move focus into it and let focus return out; ensure every focusable element is reachable and escapable.

patterns.failureShape: A modal, dialog, or overlay panel can't be dismissed from the keyboard — pressing Escape does nothing — forcing keyboard users to hunt for a close control or reload the page.
patterns.fix: Add an Escape key handler that closes the modal and returns focus to the trigger. Pair it with a visible, focusable close button.

patterns.failureShape: An interactive element is built from non-interactive markup (StaticText, div, span, or an icon) with no link/button role and no tab stop, so it can't be focused or activated by keyboard at all.
patterns.fix: Build interactive controls from native <a>/<button> elements so they're in the tab order, or add the correct role plus tabindex="0" and keyboard handlers. Don't make plain text or icons the only way to trigger an action.
